zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Percy於1134年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾惠特比時，她的父親William de Percy Lord of Topcliffe22歲，母親Alice Clare14歲。她於1150年與Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1204年10月13日之前在英國諾圖波藍德，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾惠特比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Percy was born in 1134, in Whitby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Percy Lord of Topcliffe, was 22 and her mother, Alice Clare, was 14. She married Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy in 1150. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 13 October 1204, in Northumberland, England, and was buried in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Percy est née en 1134, à Whitby, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Percy Lord of Topcliffe, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Clare, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy en 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 13 octobre 1204, à Northumberland, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1150 Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb vor 13. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Percyが1134年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウィトビーで生まれた時，父William de Percy Lord of Topcliffeは22歳，母Alice Clareは14歳であった。1150年にJoscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1204年10月13日以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドで死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Percy(이)가 1134년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 휘트비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Percy Lord of Topcliffe(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Clare(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1150년 Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 10월 13일 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 휘트비에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Percy родилась в 1134 г. в местности уитби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Percy Lord of Topcliffe было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Clare, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy в 1150 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 13 октябрь 1204 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия и была похоронена в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
